hero.name: Rohan Koka
hero.subtitle: Building things. Breaking things. Learning the whole time.

about.bio: A rising college student at the University of Pittsburgh, studying Cybersecurity Analytics & Operations. I grew up on basketball courts and computer labs — equally comfortable running a playbook and running a terminal. I love the puzzle of security, the creativity of building, and the discipline of showing up every day.
about.lookingFor: Currently looking for SWE and security internships where I can contribute, learn, and prove myself.
about.strengths: Curious, competitive, adapts fast. Known for tinkering until things break, then fixing them.

skills.name: Python
skills.note: Primary weapon. Comfortable across CLI and web.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.note: Growing fluency. Building frontends and interactivity.

skills.name: HTML/CSS
skills.note: Solid fundamentals. Responsive design, modern layouts.

skills.name: Cybersecurity
skills.note: Deep curiosity. Knows enough to be dangerous.

skills.name: Cryptography
skills.note: Applied it in real projects. Caesar Cipher was just the start.

skills.name: Networking
skills.note: TCP/IP, protocols, the backbone of security.

skills.name: Git & GitHub
skills.note: Version control is second nature. All repos public.

skills.name: Streamlit
skills.note: Go-to for quick data apps and prototypes.

skills.name: VS Code
skills.note: Daily driver. Extensions make it a full IDE.

skills.name: Terminal
skills.note: CLI over GUI when it counts.

projects.name: NBA 2K Rating Guessing Game
projects.description: Guess NBA 2K overall ratings of current players. Score points based on accuracy — exact match gets 10. 10 rounds, max score 100.

projects.name: NBA 2025 Draft Quiz
projects.description: Guess what pick each player was selected in the 2025 NBA Draft. Real draft data, real bragging rights.

projects.name: Password Strength Checker
projects.description: Web app that scores passwords across 6 security criteria. Visual progress bars, real-time feedback, and a very clear "your password is weak" button.

projects.name: Caesar Cipher Encoder/Decoder
projects.description: Interactive cryptography tool with a retro terminal feel. Shift letters 1–25, toggle encode/decode, watch the transformation happen in real-time.

stats: Delivered food orders and provided customer service in a high-volume, fast-paced environment
Interacted with 200+ customers per shift, strengthening verbal communication and time management
Maintained accuracy and efficiency under pressure while managing multiple orders simultaneously
Joined a competitive 500+ member STEM internship focused on introductory programming and game development
Contributed to collaborative coding projects and earned a leadership role, mentoring beginner participants
Received a formal letter of recommendation from internship coordinator for performance and initiative
